name: OpenCanary - FTP Login Attempt
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Security Onion Solutions
SIGMA Title: OpenCanary - FTP Login Attempt
SIGMA Description: Detects instances where an FTP service on an OpenCanary node has had a login attempt.

False positives:
- Unlikely

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%logtype%2000%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY OpenCanary - FTP Login Attempt on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%logtype%2000%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: OpenCanary - FTP Login Attempt
